Advisories are loaded from OSV and withdrawn advisories are excluded.
Every finding records the dependency, exact version, advisory id, advisory URL, and exact query.

findings.summary: body-parser vulnerable to denial of service when url encoding is enabled
express vulnerable to XSS via response.redirect()
Express.js Open Redirect in malformed URLs
Inefficient Regular Expression Complexity in marked
Marked vulnerable to XSS from data URIs
Marked allows Regular Expression Denial of Service (ReDoS) attacks
Inefficient Regular Expression Complexity in marked
Sanitization bypass using HTML Entities in marked
Regular Expression Denial of Service in marked
Denial of Service in mongodb
Arbitrary local file read vulnerability during template rendering
Arbitrary Code Execution in underscore
Underscore has unlimited recursion in _.flatten and _.isEqual, potential for DoS attack

method.false_positive_control: Each finding must be present in OSV's response for the exact package/version tuple and is replayed by an independent verification step.
method.query_contract: { package: { ecosystem: npm, name }, version: exact_version }

observations.statement: The audit input is pinned to an immutable repository commit and lockfile digest.
Every OSV query uses an exact installed direct production dependency version.
Advisories are loaded from OSV and withdrawn advisories are excluded.
Every finding records the dependency, exact version, advisory id, advisory URL, and exact query.

findings.summary: body-parser vulnerable to denial of service when url encoding is enabled
express vulnerable to XSS via response.redirect()
Express.js Open Redirect in malformed URLs
Inefficient Regular Expression Complexity in marked
Marked vulnerable to XSS from data URIs
Marked allows Regular Expression Denial of Service (ReDoS) attacks
Inefficient Regular Expression Complexity in marked
Sanitization bypass using HTML Entities in marked
Regular Expression Denial of Service in marked
Denial of Service in mongodb
Arbitrary local file read vulnerability during template rendering
Arbitrary Code Execution in underscore
Underscore has unlimited recursion in _.flatten and _.isEqual, potential for DoS attack

method.false_positive_control: Each finding must be present in OSV's response for the exact package/version tuple and is replayed by an independent verification step.
method.query_contract: { package: { ecosystem: npm, name }, version: exact_version }

observations.statement: The audit input is pinned to an immutable repository commit and lockfile digest.
Every OSV query uses an exact installed direct production dependency version.
Advisories are loaded from OSV and withdrawn advisories are excluded.
Every finding records the dependency, exact version, advisory id, advisory URL, and exact query.

data.summary: Audited 16 exact direct production dependency versions from the pinned OWASP NodeGoat lockfile and found 13 current OSV advisories with exact-version evidence.

findings.summary: body-parser vulnerable to denial of service when url encoding is enabled
express vulnerable to XSS via response.redirect()
Express.js Open Redirect in malformed URLs
Inefficient Regular Expression Complexity in marked
Marked vulnerable to XSS from data URIs
Marked allows Regular Expression Denial of Service (ReDoS) attacks
Inefficient Regular Expression Complexity in marked
Sanitization bypass using HTML Entities in marked
Regular Expression Denial of Service in marked
Denial of Service in mongodb
Arbitrary local file read vulnerability during template rendering
Arbitrary Code Execution in underscore
Underscore has unlimited recursion in _.flatten and _.isEqual, potential for DoS attack

method.false_positive_control: Each finding must be present in OSV's response for the exact package/version tuple and is replayed by an independent verification step.
method.query_contract: { package: { ecosystem: npm, name }, version: exact_version }

observations.statement: The audit input is pinned to an immutable repository commit and lockfile digest.
Every OSV query uses an exact installed direct production dependency version.
Advisories are loaded from OSV and withdrawn advisories are excluded.
Every finding records the dependency, exact version, advisory id, advisory URL, and exact query.

evidence.summary: Audited 16 exact direct production dependency versions from the pinned OWASP NodeGoat lockfile and found 13 current OSV advisories with exact-version evidence.
